---
pagetitle: "Barış Deniz Sağlam"
---

```{=html}
<header class="hero">
  <img class="avatar" src="profile.jpg" alt="Barış Deniz Sağlam">
  <div class="hero-text">
    <p>I'm a senior AI engineer and PhD researcher. For six-plus years I've designed and
    shipped production AI systems — owning architecture, system design, and tech-stack
    decisions across health tech, insurance, legal tech, and aerospace. Now I'm focused on
    research — foundation models, continual learning, and neuro-symbolic AI.</p>
    <div class="herorow">
      <span class="social">
        <a href="https://github.com/bdsaglam" aria-label="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
        <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/bdsaglam" aria-label="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
        <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ItgIKcYAAAAJ" aria-label="Google Scholar"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i></a>
        <a href="mailto:bdsaglam@gmail.com" aria-label="Email"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i></a>
      </span>
      <a class="cvlink" href="cv.html"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-arrow-down"></i> CV</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</header>
```

## Recent

::: {.recent}
- [Jun 2026]{.when}[Won the [**DocVQA**](https://rrc.cvc.uab.es/?com=news&view=data&id=83) challenge at **ICDAR 2026**.]{.what}
- [Sep 2025]{.when}[Started a **PhD** in Information Systems at METU.]{.what}
- [Oct 2024]{.when}[Completed an **MSc in Data Informatics** at METU.]{.what}
:::

## Writing

[**MSc Thesis** — *Knowledge Graph Augmented Multi-Hop Question Answering Using Large Language Models*. METU, 2024. [Open archive](https://open.metu.edu.tr/handle/11511/111317)]{.thesis}

::: {.postlist}
- [Perceive-Reason-Code: which part of a document agent actually does the work?](posts/perceive-reason-code/index.html){.pt}[Jul 2026]{.pd}[Dissecting a document-QA agent — which of perceive, reason, or code actually drives performance.]{.pdesc}
- [Fine-tuning vs. Prompting](posts/fine-tuning-vs-prompting/index.html){.pt}[Feb 2025]{.pd}[When adapting weights beats prompting, and what it costs.]{.pdesc}
- [Is Everything an Abstraction?](posts/is-everything-an-abstraction/index.html){.pt}[Jan 2025]{.pd}[Physics, Kant, and the layers we build to grasp reality.]{.pdesc}
:::

[All writing →](writing.html){.more}

## Experience

::: {.cvrole}
[Senior AI Engineer — Independent Contractor]{.rh}
[2025–present · Bosch Legends Lab, Novee AI, Genie AI · Remote]{.rmeta}
:::
::: {.cvrole}
[AI Software Engineer — Peppy Health]{.rh}
[2023–2025 · London, UK (remote)]{.rmeta}
:::
::: {.cvrole}
[Senior Software Engineer — Tractable]{.rh}
[2021–2023 · London, UK (remote)]{.rmeta}
:::
::: {.cvrole}
[Software Development Engineer — Amazon Web Services]{.rh}
[2020–2021 · Berlin, Germany (hybrid)]{.rmeta}
:::

[Full CV →](cv.html){.more}

## Projects

::: {.cards}
::: {.card}
[Feb 2026]{.cdate}

### [Abstract Reasoning (epiq)](https://github.com/bdsaglam/epiq)
An LLM agent that solves ARC-AGI puzzles by implicit program synthesis in a Python REPL, with holdout verification.
[[Code](https://github.com/bdsaglam/epiq)]{.links}
:::
::: {.card}
[Jun 2025]{.cdate}

### [Fine-tuning vs. Prompting](https://github.com/bdsaglam/pipeline-llm-adaptation)
Prompt optimization matches LoRA fine-tuning at lower cost on entity–relation extraction.
[[Code](https://github.com/bdsaglam/pipeline-llm-adaptation) · [Post](posts/fine-tuning-vs-prompting/index.html)]{.links}
:::
::: {.card}
[Apr 2025]{.cdate}

### [RL for Multi-Hop QA](https://github.com/bdsaglam/rlvr)
GRPO-trained Llama-3.1-8B learns agentic retrieval — answer F1 0.30 → 0.48 on MuSiQue.
[[Code](https://github.com/bdsaglam/rlvr)]{.links}
:::
:::

[All projects →](projects.html){.more}
